metadata.description: The subject is an apparent female in her 50s, with warm olive skin tone and visible fine lines around the eyes and forehead. Her face is an oval shape with a gently defined jawline. She has very short, buzz-cut salt-and-pepper hair, with a receding hairline visible on the temples. Her almond-shaped eyes are dark brown and set slightly wide apart. Her eyebrows are medium-thick and softly arched. The nose is straight with a rounded tip and a slightly wide bridge. Her lips are medium-thick with a well-defined cupid's bow. Numerous small brown freckles are scattered across her cheeks and nose. Her expression is calm and thoughtful, with her head turned slightly to the left and angled slightly upwards.
